questionHtml:
A person stands in an elevator (lift). The total mass of the person and the elevator is 800 kg. The elevator accelerates upward at 2.0 m s−2.

What is the tension in the cable?


A.  1.6 kN

B.  6.4 kN

C.  8.0 kN

D.  9.6 kN

meta.title: A person stands in an elevator (lift). The total mass of the person and the elevator is 800 kg. The elevator accelerates upward at 2.0 m s−2. What is the tension in the cable? A. 1
